name: non-profit finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For non-profit finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient budget tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide a budget planning app instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For non-profit finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient budget tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide a budget planning app instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software
